diagrams.title: Capacity-Performance Relationship Curve
diagrams.description: Graph showing response time/throughput vs capacity utilization, illustrating the knee of the curve and diminishing returns
elements: Y-axis: Performance (throughput or inverse of response time)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize diminishing returns and identify optimal capacity investment point

diagrams.title: Bottleneck Migration Flow
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how resolving one bottleneck creates another constraint in the system
elements: CPU upgraded → bottleneck shifts to memory
Memory upgraded → bottleneck shifts to disk I/O
Disk upgraded → bottleneck shifts to network
Network upgraded → application code becomes bottleneck
diagrams.purpose: Understand that capacity increases must be holistic rather than component-focused

diagrams.title: Cost-Benefit Analysis of Capacity Increase
diagrams.description: Dual-axis graph showing costs (linear) vs benefits (diminishing), with optimal ROI zone marked
elements: Left Y-axis: Cost ($) - linear increase line
Right Y-axis: Performance benefit (%) - logarithmic curve
diagrams.purpose: Determine the economic justification for capacity investments
